---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for LifeOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Case
<!-- Provide a concrete use case or scenario -->

**As a** [type of user]  
**I want** [some goal]  
**So that** [some reason]

## Detailed Design (Optional)

<!-- If you have ideas on implementation, share them here -->

### UI/UX Mockups
<!-- Drag and drop images or describe the interface -->

### API Changes
<!-- Describe any API changes needed -->

### Configuration
<!-- Any new settings or options -->

## Impact

### Who Benefits
<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? -->
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Power users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Enterprises
- [ ] Specific hardware users

### Related Features
<!-- Does this relate to existing features? -->
- Related to: <!-- e.g., AI Assistant, App Store -->
- Depends on: <!-- Any prerequisites -->

## Priority

<!-- Please select one -->
- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocks adoption or major workflow
- [ ] 🟠 High - Significant improvement, highly requested
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Nice to have, moderate impact
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Minor enhancement, low priority

## Willingness to Contribute

<!-- Let us know if you'd like to help implement this -->
- [ ] I can help with design
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can help with code (Rust/TypeScript)
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can sponsor this feature

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This feature aligns with LifeOS vision (AI-native, user-friendly)
- [ ] I've considered backwards compatibility
- [ ] I've provided clear use cases

## Beta Tester Info (if applicable)

- **Beta ID**: <!-- Your beta tester ID -->
- **Testing Focus Area**: <!-- AI / Desktop / System / Other -->
